forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely this evening. Damaging winds possible during the morning. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the early morning then turning westerly 30 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 10 and 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely this evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south early this morning. Damaging winds possible in the south during the morning. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h in the late morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm this morning. Damaging winds possible during the morning. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h tending southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h before dawn then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, with possible small hail near the coast late this afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h tending southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast. Possible small hail late this afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Possible small hail in the south in the early morning. Damaging winds possible near the coast during the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely this evening. Damaging winds possible in the west during the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly in the morning then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely this evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the late morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely this evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the east coast early this morning. Damaging winds possible during the morning. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending south to southwesterly and becoming light during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely late this afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
